title: Lock scrambles every number — the private key brings each one home
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — RSA lock and unlock for every message ---
def __plot(e, d, n):
    locked = [[m, pow(m, e, n)] for m in range(n)]
    unlocked = [[m, pow(pow(m, e, n), d, n)] for m in range(n)]
    return [
        {"name": "unlocked with private key (back home)", "points": unlocked, "highlight": True},
        {"name": "after locking with public key", "points": locked, "highlight": False},
    ]
